list.vod_blurb: In the tradition of American Pie, Lord of the Rings, and Wet Hot American Summer comes a new instalm
list.vod_content: In the tradition of American Pie, Lord of the Rings, and Wet Hot American Summer comes a new instalment in a beloved IP franchise: The Napa Boys are back! In search of wine. In search of women. In search of themselves.

On holiday in Chiang Mai, he happens to meet Sila, the wealthy owner of Phu Saengdao farm and hotel. The two find themselves strangely drawn to one another and ultimately spend a night together, thinking they wouldn't see each other again. Within a few days, however, Saithan's status changes from Sila's hookup to his debtor after a car accident with the child of an influential local. Sila happens upon the situation and volunteers to settle the issue and pay for the damages. Wanting to prove that he can step up and solve his own problems, Saithan withholds the truth from his family and decides to work for Phu Saengdao farm in order to pay his debt. Sila himself is having a good time; he now has a friend to chat with, to sleep with and lift him out of boredom. ~~ Adapted from the novel "Until You #RiakDadSiThan" (Until You #à¹€à¸£à¸µà¸¢à¸پà¹پà¸”à¹ٹà¸”à¸ھà¸´à¸کà¸²à¸£) by CEO
